prompt: Create a vertical fashion editorial photograph from an extreme low-angle, worm’s-eye perspective looking upward from near the model’s abdomen through a tunnel of sheer white knitted lace fabric. The subject is a young woman with warm brown hair, loose slightly messy hair, sunglasses resting on top of her head, and one small colorful braided strand visible near the left side of her hair. Her face should be present but intentionally obscured by a plain centered square block in a natural skin-brown color, as if anonymized. She wears a loose white open-knit crochet sweater or cover-up that frames the lower chest and shoulders, with soft white fabric draping along both sides to form a glowing arch overhead. The foreground shows a close-up of her bare abdomen and navel, glossy with bright dappled reflections from sunlight passing through the lace, creating sparkling organic patterns across skin and fabric. Use shallow depth of field: the abdomen and lace highlights are prominent, the face and upper background are slightly softer. The atmosphere is airy, summery, intimate, high-fashion, and luminous, with warm beige skin tones, creamy whites, strong natural backlight, and crisp specular highlights. Canvas is a 9:16 vertical poster composition. Add small elegant white serif editorial text: top left two-line title “WHITE VISION” with a short thin horizontal line beneath it, top right “PLAYFUL”, left side vertical text “STUDIO EDIT”, bottom left “VOL. 01”, and bottom right “2024 COLLECTION”. Keep the typography minimal, widely letter-spaced, and unobtrusive. Do not add extra objects, logos, watermarks, or additional text.
